input_text:
Upgraded from react-query v4 to v5. The API changed significantly — useQuery and useMutation hook signatures changed, QueryClient instantiation changed, and several types were renamed or restructured.

Went through all 40+ hook usages in the codebase and updated the type signatures and hook options to match v5 API. TypeScript was helpful here — every error was a compile-time type error pointing to the exact change needed. All type errors resolved.
reviewer_notes: Successfully completed react-query v4→v5 upgrade. Completed migration, nothing rejected.
